Nataraja Homa (Homa Invoking the Dancing Form of Shiva)
‘Nataraja’ is derived from the Sanskrit word ‘Nata,’ meaning dance or drama. Raja means king. Nataraja can be interpreted as the ‘King of Dance.’ Shiva’s dance in Tillai (Chidambaram) sets the base for depicting Shiva in dance forms. As Nataraja, Shiva is represented in his roles as the creator, preserver, and destroyer. His cosmic dance, the Tandav, can create and destroy the universe. The Ananda Tandav is the ‘dance of bliss.’ Performing the Nataraja Homa can bestow creative skills, stability, success, and prosperity. It removes negative forces and grants positive energy.
In Nataraja, Shiva represents the source of all movement within the cosmos, represented by the arch of flames. The purpose is to remove humanity from the illusion of the ‘self’ and the ‘world.’ He represents apocalypse and creation. He eliminates the imaginary world or ‘Maya’ and transforms it into power and enlightenment. Through his endless cosmic dance of creation, preservation, embodiment, destruction, protection, and release, Nataraja denotes a deep understanding of the universe. Performing the Nataraja Homa helps us dispel ignorance and negative forces, enhances creative skills and positive energy, and bestows vigor, stability, success, and prosperity.
Nataraja is an important symbol of Shiva. Creation of the world, its maintenance and destruction, concealment of the soul, its liberation, and subduing ignorance are represented by his dance. The circle around Nataraja is Maya (illusion), experienced through the cycle of birth and death. The ring of fire surrounding Nataraja represents the compressed cosmos of mass, time, and space. Its endless cycle of destruction and regeneration moves in tune with the beat of his drum and the rhythm of his steps.
As per Sacred texts, performing Nataraja Homa can invoke his Divine grace and blessings, promote stability, instill creative skills, dispel ignorance and negative influences, promote positive energy, and bestow good fortune, success, and prosperity.
According to Sacred texts, performing the Nataraja Homa can grant the following blessings:
Provide stability in personal and professional life
You will receive Sacred grey ash blessed in the Homa, which can be kept in your prayer altar. You can duly apply it on your forehead whenever you seek the Divine blessings of the deity.

Panchamukhi Ganesha Homa (Homa Invoking Five-Faced Ganesha)
Panchamukhi Ganesha has five faces that are the embodiment of all power and strength. Each of the five faces points in a different direction, hence the name Panchamukha. The Panchamukhi Ganesha, when placed facing the east, works wonders for the home or office. According to Sacred texts, performing the Panchamukhi Ganesha Homa can nullify evil and dark forces and bestow prosperity and good fortune.
Unique Traits of Panchamukhi Ganesha Homa
Each face of the Panchamukhi Ganesha symbolizes one of the Pancha Koshas or the five sheaths in the subtle anatomy of humans. They are Annamaya (flesh), Pranamaya (breath or energy), Manomaya (mental), Vijnanamaya (body of upper consciousness), and Anandamaya (body of cosmic bliss). The fifth face of Ganapati symbolizes the highest form of yogic experience known as Anandamaya Kosha. It is pure consciousness. Panchamukhi Ganesha, kept at home or the workplace, brings auspicious and positive vibrations of spirituality, bliss, and harmony.
Ganesha, in this form, is extremely powerful and can ward off evil spirits and bad occurrences without one’s conscious awareness. Performing the Panchamukhi Ganesha Homa helps evoke the spiritual energy to regulate the five senses , and grant divine affection, love, authenticity, courage, and renunciation. Performing this Homa wards off negative influences and bestows prosperity.

Bestows positive energy, success, and prosperity

In her four hands, she holds a trident, a small drum, a skull, and a snake in the form of a noose.

Sarabeshwara Homa (Homa to Destroy Negative Forces and End Misfortune)
Sarabeshwara is an aspect of Shiva to calm down the ferocious Narasimha avatar of Vishnu after the latter had destroyed the demon king Hiranyakashipu. Narasimha’s fierce and fearful anger continued relentlessly and even terrified the Gods. Shiva was unable to calm Vishnu in the Veerabhadra form, so he assumed the shape of Sarabha, the king of birds. As per Sacred texts, performing the Sarabeshwara Homa can remove evil forces, fear and stress, and bestow strength, peace, and happiness.
Scriptures hail Sarabeshwara as the destroyer of all evil and protector of his devotees. He bestows courage and strength to face adversity. He removes fear and anxiety and ensures the speedy recovery of those undergoing surgery. Sarabeshwara is part-lion, a part-bird with eight legs, four hands, two wings, sharp teeth, and nails, with infinite power. This form of Shiva is believed to be the ocean of kindness and compassion. He forgives all sins and Karmas committed knowingly or unknowingly by self-confession. Performing this Homa removes obstacles from one’s life, bestowing peace and wellbeing.
Sarabeshwara, a form of Shiva, is known for bestowing peace and Dharma (righteousness). Dattatreya Shirdi Sai Baba Homa (Homa for Overall Protection and Well-being)
Shirdi Sai Baba, the widely venerated saint, is believed to be the Divine incarnation of Dattatreya. Dattatreya is a highly revered Universal Guru who came to earth to establish the universal truth, cosmic order, and principles. He was the manifestation of all three primal energies of Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva. Dr. Pillai had named one of his Shirdi Sai Baba statues as Dattatreya Shirdi Sai Baba, who can grant overall protection and ensure well-being. Therefore, performing Dattatreya Shirdi Sai Baba Homa can offer protection from negative forces and bestow physical and mental well-being.
Introduction to Dattatreya Shirdi Sai Baba Homa
Shirdi Sai Baba is widely perceived to be the Divine incarnation of Dattatreya, according to the Sai Satcharitra. Dattatreya has the powers of creation, preservation, and destruction; so too, Sai Baba. Shirdi Sai Baba holds no record of his birth, origin, name, or time of birth. He came to be bestowed the name 'Sai' by the village Temple priest when he arrived at the village of Shirdi at the age of sixteen. The young saint sat in an asana position under the neem tree, motionless, and observed severe penance regardless of heat or cold. After disappearing for a year, he reappeared in 1858 and stayed permanently in Shirdi. Devotees regard Shirdi Sai Baba as a fakir, a saint, or Sadguru.
Unique Traits of Dattatreya Shirdi Sai Baba
Shirdi Sai Baba, like Dattatreya, lived an austere life and took in all the sins and bad Karma of his devotees. He embraced various aspects of Jainism (ahimsa), Buddhism (renunciation), Hinduism (dharma), Christianity (love and compassion), and Islam (universal brotherhood). They blended seamlessly into his way of life. Sai's teachings were focused on devotion, self-surrender to Sadguru, service, and compassion. He was extremely benevolent to his devotees. He performed numerous miracles to ensure his devotees were safe and gave 'darshan' to people in the form of Sri Rama, Sri Krishna, or Vitobha, depending on their faith.
Description of Dattatreya Shirdi Sai Baba Homa
Shirdi Sai Baba enunciated Dattatreya in his path of spirituality and practices. He often appeared in the dreams of his devotees long after departing from his body and gave his advice. He is widely revered as Dattatreya, who was symbolic of the union of the Trimurti- Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva. Shirdi Sai Baba is highly revered as a spiritual saint in the highest category of yogis. Performing the Dattatreya Shirdi Sai Baba Homa can remove or nullify dark and negative energy and bestow overall well-being. It can enhance one's spiritual knowledge and experience. The powerful spiritual energy of the Homa can remove obstacles from your path and pave the way to progress.

Shiva Lingam | Shiva Lingam Temple | AstroVed Temple
AstroVed Temple Services for Shiva Lingam
AstroVed Temple Services for Shiva Lingam
Shiva Lingam is a symbol of generative power. The holy union of both male (Purusha) and female (Prakriti) forms as one symbol representing the all-pervading, and formless Shiva is Shivalinga. The Shivalinga consists of three parts, which refer to the Hindu Trinity- Brahma (the Creator), Vishnu (the Preserver), and Shiva (the Destroyer). It has a circular base (Brahma), a bowl-like pedestal in the middle (Vishnu), and the topmost cylindrical pillar with a rounded head (Shiva).

He is considered as formless, timeless, limitless, and transcendent and is hailed as the patron God of Yoga, Meditation and Arts. He is often depicted with matted hair and a crescent moon on his head. His right hand holds a string of rosary beads made of Rudraksha. With his body covered in holy ash (Vibhuti) and seated on a tiger skin, he is shown garlanded with a serpent and holds a trident in his hand. The third eye on his forehead indicates his ability to transform the world by destroying existing life and bringing about new forms of existence. This Sacred fire lab to Shiva can absolve all your sins, destroy obstacles, and bestow overall success, good health and happiness.

AstroVed Temple Services for Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
AstroVed Temple Services for Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
Ganesha is well known as the elephant-headed son of Shiva and Parvathi. He is a God of intelligence, new beginnings, and success and can remove any obstacles that impede progress. This most sought-after God is often represented with his two consorts, Buddhi (intellect) and Siddhi (spiritual power), who are the daughters of Prajapati Vishwaroopa. With his consorts, he had three children – Shubha (Auspiciousness), Labha (Profit), and Santoshi (Satisfaction). Ganesha is always depicted with four arms, holding an ax in one upper arm and a noose in the other. His lower right-hand holds his broken tusk, and his left hand holds a sweet dumpling (modak). This version of Ganesha also has his consorts on his left and right sides.
: Please remember to choose your service start date after making the payment.
As per Sacred texts, Ganesha is the Lord of Good Fortune who bestows prosperity and wealth and is the Destroyer of Material and Spiritual obstacles. He is the overlord of Ketu, the planet associated with asceticism, salvation, and separation, and Mercury, the planet of intellect. By worshipping Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi, devotees can gain relief from the planets’ negative effects, overcome internal and external negativities, seek out new opportunities, and attain peace of mind and joy.
Water Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
Water is the most common item used in the Abishekam (Hydration Pooja), and the Water Abishekam remains the simplest hydration Pooja to Ganesha. Performing water Abishekam can clear your obstacles, cleanse bad Karma, and bestow peace of mind and happiness with the Divine blessings of Ganesha and Siddhi Buddhi.
Milk Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
Milk Abishekam is done by those seeking a problem-free and successful life. Apart from removing impediments and bestowing success in endeavors, performing Milk Abishekam can help you gain Ganesha’s blessings for clearing afflictions and enjoying a long healthy life.
Honey Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
According to Sacred texts, Honey provides strength, energy, and vitality, removes problems, and fulfills your wishes when used in Abishekam to Ganesha.
Tender Coconut Water Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
According to religious texts, Tender Coconut Water Abishekam to Ganesha can help eliminate negativity, bring an end to difficult situations, and bestow clarity of thought and peace.
Curd Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
Performing Curd Abishekam to Ganesha can help provide progeny blessings, clear impediments to progress, improve your health, and remove sorrows.
Rosewater Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
Performing Abishekam to Ganesha using Rosewater, as per Sacred texts can help balance your emotions, dispel anxiety and depression, remove negative thoughts, and boost your emotional well-being.
Turmeric Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
As per traditional belief, performing Turmeric Abishekam to Ganesha on Mrigasira, Purva Phalguni, and Anuradha star can help you gain the blessings of Ganesha to remove known and unknown obstacles in your path to success and bestow auspiciousness.
Sandal Paste Abishekam to Ganesha with Siddhi and Buddhi
Sandal Paste Abishekam to Ganesha can help improve your efforts to attain spiritual enlightenment and connect with the Divine. Performing this Abishekam as per Sacred texts, can bestow prosperity, help grow wealth, and enjoy peace of mind.

Siddhi Buddhi Ganapati Homa (Ganesha Homa for Siddhi Powers and Intellect)
Ganesha is one of the most loved among the Gods. Considered the God of beginnings, he is the Supreme Power. No day or initiative starts without offering him worship. Scriptures hail that Ganapati can remove hurdles from one’s path and resolve problems. He also guides you to success in your endeavors. Performing the Siddhi Buddhi Ganapati Homa can remove negative energy and hurdles, resolve financial distress and health-related issues, and bestow knowledge, success, and prosperity.
Introduction to Siddhi Buddhi Ganapati Homa
This Homa (Homa) invokes the blessings of Ganesha, the God of new beginnings. Ganesha is highly revered as the remover of obstacles. It is imperative to invoke his blessings at the initiation of any new venture to ensure the success of the endeavor. The elephant-headed archetype is the epitome of various auspicious qualities that reverberate throughout the universe, making him dear to his devotees. Performing this Homa invoking Ganesha can instill you with confidence and courage to face adversities and act as a remedy for overcoming life’s difficulties.
Ganesha is often aligned with the concepts of Siddhi and Buddhi. While Buddhi denotes intellect and wisdom, Siddhi denotes success and accomplishment. Yet sometimes, these qualities are perceived as Goddesses; and as consorts of Ganapati. As per Sacred texts, performing this Homa can not only eradicate problems in personal and professional life but also bestow marital bliss.
Description of Siddhi Buddhi Ganapati Homa
The Siddhi Buddhi Homam is a powerful and Sacred Vedic ritual that is believed to bring a lot of positivity to life. It can remove negativity, resolve financial hardships and health-related issues, bestow good health, knowledge, intellect and success, and enable you to achieve your goals. It confers peace and happiness and fulfills your desires when worship is offered with sincere devotion.
According to Sacred texts, performing Siddhi Buddhi Ganapati Homa can grant the following blessings:
Resolve personal and professional problems
Strengthen relationships and marital bliss
You will receive Sacred grey ash from the Homa blessed in the ritual. You can duly apply it on your forehead whenever you seek the Divine blessings of the deity.

Varahi Devi | Varahi Amman Temple | AstroVed Temple
“Varahi is a performer. Varahi is a form of Lakshmi. She is also related to the Goddess of Shreem, who is Mahalakshmi. Varahi is the Goddess of the earth plane and deep down into the earth. We can all become prosperous through the participation of Varahi, who will perform money miracles.”
Varahi is the fast-performing Goddess, who remains the symbol of courage and victory. She is a form of Lakshmi and is regarded as the Divinity for material wealth, especially gold. The kings in ancient times propitiated Varahi to enrich their kingdoms with immense wealth. She is also the Goddess of the earth plane, who can bestow all that mother earth offers. Varahi, the wild-boar faced Goddess, is said to have been created by Vishnu’s Varaha Avatar. Hailed as the Supreme Mother and granter of boons, Varahi holds Shankha (Conch), which signifies auspiciousness and prosperity, and Chakra (Discus), signifying swiftness and protection. Her other two hands show protective Abhaya and the boon-bestowing Varada mudras.

According to Sacred texts, Varahi is the Goddess of the earth, with the face of a wild boar, and holds a Dhandam (staff) in her hand as a symbol of protection. She is considered the embodiment of Dhairyam (courage), Veeryam (valor), and Vijayam (victory). Devi Mahatmyam describes that Varahi was created as one of the Saptamatrikas (7 Maiden Goddesses) by the Varaha Avatar of Vishnu to fight the demonic forces. She is also the commander-in-chief of the army of the supreme Goddess Lalita, who is considered as the ultimate Shakti and the highest aspect of Goddess Adi Parashakti (the Primordial Supreme Feminine Energy). According to Dr. Pillai, her blessings can transform your material life and help you accomplish goals fast.

Vyasa Draupadi Homa (Homa For Wealth, Status & Self-Esteem)
This Homa invokes the blessings of Goddess Vyasa Draupadi, the queen from the great epic Mahabharata. Goddess Vyasa Draupadi is an ancient Goddess from the great epic Mahabharata. She was a queen married to the Pancha Pandava, the five brothers endowed with powers from five different Gods. She is considered extremely beautiful and the Goddess of wisdom and  power, and the one who can bring dramatic results. Dr. Pillai says that performing a Homa for Vyasa Draupadi can bestow good wealth, status, material comforts, and self-esteem, and help resolve financial problems.
Dr. Pillai explains the story of Vyasa Draupadi as she meditated on gaining incredible power and ended up marrying five brothers called Pancha Pandava. They were semi-Divine as they were born through five different powerful Gods and were endowed with five different energies and wisdom. By marrying them all and becoming their queen, Vyasa Draupadi has the incredible power of the five gods combined with her own wisdom and strength. Performing Vyasa Draupadi Homa can bestow status, power, wisdom, self-esteem especially for women, and prosperity.

Zodiac Signs Dates & Personality Traits | AstroVed.com
Thoroughly Understand About Your Zodiac Signs
Zodiac signs can tell a lot about people. Their strengths, their weaknesses, the way they love, work, and get along with others. So, if you meet someone new, and want to find out what type of personality and qualities they have, all you have to do is ask them what their Zodiac Sign is. Each Zodiac Sign reveals fascinating information about the person born under that sign.
Want to understand more about someone's personality? Choose your sign and click on it.
There are 12 Zodiac Signs. Each sign has its symbol and meaning. For instance, the planetary ruler of Gemini is Mercury, who is also the Roman god of communication and eloquence. Which is why communication is so important to the Gemini-born. Each Zodiac Sign also belongs to one of four elements which represents the energy that influences it. The four elements are Air, Fire, Water, and Earth. These elements represent the kind of energy that acts in each of us.
To find out what your Zodiac Sign means, and its compatibility with other Zodiac Signs, click on your sign.
The Water Signs are highly emotional and extremely sensitive. They have good intuition and they are as deep as the ocean itself. Water signs can be quite loving but also needy. They are rather secretive but quick to give support to their loved ones. The Water Signs are Cancer, Scorpio, and Pisces.
Fire Signs are quite passionate and temperamental, but also dynamic. They have a short fuse but they don’t nurse grudges. They have an adventurous streak, and possess a lot of energy. They are physically robust and inspire others. Fire Signs are intelligent and idealistic people, who are quick to action. The Fire Signs are Aries, Leo, and Sagittarius.
Earth Signs are very down-to-earth. They tend to be conservative and practical, but they can be emotional too. They have a materialistic streak. They are loyal and devoted to those who are dear to them. The Earth Signs are Taurus, Virgo, and Capricorn.
The Air Signs are social butterflies who love communication in any form. They are good at striking up friendships. They are intellectual and analytical. They love to exchange ideas and can enliven any social gathering. They can be superficial at times. The Air Signs are Gemini, Libra, and Aquarius.

--- PAGE: Zodiac Signs Compatibility: Love, Horoscope, Marriage & More (https://www.astroved.com/zodiac-signs/compatibility) ---

Zodiac Signs Compatibility: Love, Horoscope, Marriage & More
It is not that you get along like a house of fire with all people, but only with a 'special someone' that you feel light and on top of the world
Fill your details below to inbox your Love % to your email address:
Personalized Saturn Transit Prediction Report
One Year Detailed Health And Well Being Report
Karmic Astrology Report (Past Life Influence Report)
The cosmos is termed as the zodiac, both in astronomy and astrology. It is seen as a circular belt and is divided into 12 sections known as the zodiac signs. These 12 signs are all different and have their individual and unique characteristics. The zodiac compatibility can be called the level of affinity that a sign can have for the other.
What is Zodiac Signs Compatibility by Date of Birth?
As per our traditional system, a group of star constellations falls in each of the zodiac signs. The zodiac sign of a person arrived at by this system is known as the Rashi or Moon sign, which is decided by the Moon’s movement. However, there is another system that decides a person’s zodiac sign based on the Sun’s movement. As the Sun stays for a month in a sign, whoever is born when the Sun is in a particular sign has that as his zodiac sign, which is by the date of birth. This zodiac signs compatibility by date of birth is the agreeability that exists between such sign people, arrived by their dates of birth.
Each zodiac sign being unique, the level of compatibility between different signs can be different depending on their individual characteristic traits. Here, let us try to learn in brief about such compatible signs in respect of each of the 12 zodiac signs.
The first zodiac sign Aries is a Cardinal Fire sign ruled by the warrior planet Mars. These people are courageous, independent, hard-working, and dynamic, but also aggressive and impulsive. The Aries relationship compatibility is likely to be good with itself and the fellow Fire signs Leo and Sagittarius. Besides, the Water-sign Scorpio and Air-sign Aquarius may also get attracted to Aries and could enjoy good marriage compatibility with them.
The ‘Earthy’ Taurus is ruled by Venus, the planet of beauty and love. These people can be patient, reliable, faithful, and artistic, but slow and stubborn. While Virgo and Capricorn, the other Earth signs are likely to jell well with them, the other Venus-ruled sign Libra, too, can enjoy sound relationship compatibility with them. Taurus’ love and marriage compatibility may also be good with the ‘Watery’ Cancer and ‘Fiery’ Leo signs.
The Gemini-born are known for their intellect, imagination, humor, and communication skills, but they may also be capricious and selfish. This Mercury-ruled Air sign should relate well with the ‘Airy’ Libra and Aquarius. Their birth chart study might also reveal their good horoscope compatibility with the ‘Fiery’ Aries and ‘Earthy’ Virgo regarding life-partnership.
Those born in this Moon-ruled Water sign are kind, loveable, and emotional but can also be temperamental and hyper-sensitive. While they may enjoy good zodiac compatibility with fellow Water signs Scorpio and Pisces, people of the ‘Earthy’ Taurus can find the Cancer-born quite appealing and may have good marriage compatibility with them.
Ruled by the mighty Sun, the people of the Fire sign Leo can be royal, authoritative, noble, and generous, but can also be proud and intolerant. In the natural course, the Leos are likely to have good relationship compatibility with the other ‘Fires’ Aries and Sagittarius. At the same time, a deeper look may reveal their good horoscope compatibility with the ‘Airy’ Gemini and Libra and the ‘Watery’ Cancer, also.
The Mercury-ruled ‘Earthy’ Virgos can stand out for their knowledge, memory, analytical abilities, multi-skills, and tact, but they may also be judgmental and critical. While their natural zodiac compatibility might be with Taurus and Capricorn, its ‘Earthy’ companions, the gentle and ‘Watery’ Pisces, may also enjoy good harmony with the Virgos. Besides, love can bring the Virgos closer to the Air signs Libra and Aquarius, with whom they may enjoy fine marriage compatibility.
The Venus-ruled Air sign Libra is celebrated for its sense of justice, fair play, balanced approach, and moral values. However, these gentle souls could also be confused and indecisive. They may jell well with Gemini and Aquarius, the fellow Air signs, and also Taurus, ruled by the same planet, Venus. A horoscope compatibility analysis might reveal that the relationship compatibility of Librans with the ‘Fiery’ Leos and ‘Earthy’ Virgos could also be quite good.
The Water sign Scorpio is ruled by the warrior planet Mars. These people are strong, committed, truth-seeking, and possess leadership qualities. They can, however, be also suspicious, jealous, and materialistic. Cancer and Pisces, the other Water signs, can forge close bonds with the Scorpios, whereas the Earth signs Taurus and Capricorn can also enjoy good zodiac compatibility with them.  Further, love can bring them closer to Aries, which is also Mars-governed, with whom the Scorpios can enjoy good relationship compatibility.
The benevolent planet Jupiter lords over the Fire sign Sagittarius. These people are honest, kind-hearted, philosophical, and freedom-loving but could also be tactless. The Fiery Sagittarius can associate well with all Fire signs like Aries, Leo, and Sagittarius itself. In addition, the Fire can move well with Air, and so Sagittarius might enjoy sound zodiac signs compatibility with Air signs Gemini and Aquarius.
Read more about Sagittarius compatibility
Capricorn is an Earth sign ruled by Saturn. The Capricorn-born can be talented, loyal, responsible, and ambitious but might dictate terms to others and be untrusting. Taurus and Virgo, the other Earth signs, may enjoy sound zodiac compatibility with Capricorn; at the same time, the birth chart study can reveal that they may also have good horoscope compatibility with the ‘Watery’ Cancer.
Aquarius is another Saturn-ruled sign with its element being Air. The Aquarius-born can be innovative, scientific, and could fight for public causes. However, they can also be slow and eccentric. The zodiac signs compatibility of Aquarius is likely to be good with the other Air signs Gemini and Libra, for sure. But the ‘Air’ can also move well with ‘Fire,’ and so, Aquarius could well have good relationship compatibility with people of Aries, Leo, and Sagittarius. In addition, the ‘Earthy’ Virgo and ‘Watery’ Pisces can also have a good affinity with Aquarius and sound marriage compatibility with these people.
This last is a Water sign with Jupiter as its Lord. The Pisces born might be flexible, forgiving, soft, and philosophical, but they could also be timid and hyper-sensitive. Along with the other Water signs Cancer and Scorpio, the Pisces may go well with the ‘Earthy’ Virgo, too, and hence, Pisces could enjoy sound horoscope compatibility with those of all these signs. When the question of love comes, it can be the ‘Fiery’ Aries and ‘Airy’ Aquarius that may enjoy good harmony with Pisces.

Aquarius Compatibility: Love, Relationship, Marriage & Trust
To study Aquarius compatibility, we need to analyze the sun sign Aquarius in combination with each of the other sun signs. Each sun sign match has its own strengths and weaknesses, and unique characteristics.
The Aquarius is the 11th sign of the zodiac chart and is known as Kumbha in Vedic astrology.
The Aquarians are humanitarians who can also be innovative thinkers. Just as the water-bearer, their symbol provides water to the world, the
may enrich the world with their valuable thoughts. Ruled by planet Saturn, they can be compassionate, broad-minded, modern, and truth-seekers. But they can be harsh and cold, too.
What can be the reasons for those from these signs relating well with the Aquarius people?
both are gentle signs that are open, and they love to enjoy life, too. This enjoyment may extend to the bed also, strengthen their relationship, and make it long-lasting.
Both intellectuality, as well as the artistic frame of mind, may keep Aquarius and Libra well-connected. Libra is a cordial sign, and these people like to spread peace and joy around. And Aquarius may understand and appreciate these virtues, and this can turn their partnership, loving, intimate, and enduring.
High-energy and adventurism may be the well-known traits of Sagittarius, but these happen to be Aquarius qualities, too. And these are only two among many of the commonalities that exist between them. These may inspire them to partner with each other with a life-long commitment.

The affectionate and broad-minded Aquarius may find Virgos, who tend to turn inflexible and critical often, unlikely companions for life. The Aquarius’ optimism may also clash with Virgo’s pessimism. Such differences can create so significant a distance between them, which even physical intimacy cannot bridge that easily.
The possessiveness, aggression, and secrecy of the Scorpios may virtually scare off the compassionate Aquarius. Their fundamental differences may be so sharp that they may not be able to get along as congenial couples at all.
Pisces’ possessiveness may simply be suffocating and leave Aquarius virtually gasping for breath! This can prove to be a single factor that may derail the relationship between the two, which might have otherwise developed into a breezy one!

Love finds its way! Similarly, nature takes its course to mix air and earth! What will happen when people of these two signs come together? Will
be a 'divine-love-couple'?  Can their bond be strong and healthy, and together can they create magic?
Aquarius and Capricorn Personality Traits
The air-sign Aquarius is represented by the water-bearer. These people are very sharp and sturdy, and they love to experiment and try out different things in life.
Capricorn is ambitious and focused, and their determination in life would bring them laurels. They are also ambitious, and many of them reach the pinnacle of success in life. These people can be counted among the most reliable and consistent zodiac signs.
Fill your details below to inbox your Love % to your email address:

So, rushing into the relationship is not their game. But still, the Aquarian being intelligent will entice Capricorn. The power of precision may also bring a perfect rhythm in the life of Aquarius, who is as such breezy.
Generally, people rush towards things and forget the sole purpose of life. But this couple may be otherwise! Also, the Aquarius Capricorn couple would always choose the journey more than the destination, and this can make their goal more fruitful! Yes, there will be differences, but when

Aries and Scorpio are fire and water signs, respectively. There are indeed poles apart and contrast each other, almost entirely.
Then how can the Aries-Scorpio compatibility work out in real life? How compatible will this seemingly incompatible combination be? Let us find out.
The twelve signs of the zodiac start with Aries, and Ram is its symbol. These people can be quite forceful and passionate. They are also go-getters who like to be distinguished in their fields and stand apart as leaders. They are usually guided by precision and perfection.
Scorpio too is passion incarnate and can be highly sensual. This water sign is marked by courage and resourcefulness, and can also be patient to get things done. They remain committed to relationships and value them a lot. They are also known for their honesty.

It is going to be interesting to learn how well this combination will work, and go how far?
The Cancerians, by nature, are imaginative, creative, and robust. Further, they are very emotional and intuitive, too. They remain loyal and committed in the bond and would try their level best to bring harmony in the relationship. They are also peacemakers and work for the betterment of their family members.
People from the air sign Aquarius are highly focused, determined, and sharp. They enjoy intellectual companionship and the interactions at those levels. Brisk and dominating, they generally succeed in their endeavors, and also in their personnel lives.

This can lead to emotional and verbal clashes, creating turbulence in the relationship. Also, Libra is rational, whereas Cancer believes in instincts. This contrast in their traits may also bring a lot of disturbance in the relationship.

Capricorn Compatibility: Love, Relationship, Marriage & Trust
To study Capricorn compatibility, we need to analyze the sun sign Capricorn in combination with each of the other sun signs. Each sun sign match has its own strengths and weaknesses, and unique characteristics.
The Capricorn is the 10th sign of the zodiac chart, and
Capricorn represents determination and ambition. It looks logical that their symbol is the mountain goat, which stands for these two traits. Governed by the much-feared planet Saturn, these people are worldly-wise, practical, patient, and disciplined.
They have a strong sense of duty, too, but can also be stubborn and pessimistic.
Having got a broad view of the Capricorns, now let us try to learn about the zodiac signs that can be quite compatible with this sign and those otherwise.
How well will these signs jell with Capricorn, and for what reasons? Let us examine!
The Capricorn goat can form a natural partnership with the Taurus bull, and there is more than one reason for this. The Capricorn longs for a cozy home, while the Taurus yearns for security. And they both can meet their partner’s needs, quite adequately! And both being earth signs make them remain firmly rooted. Passion may also add spice to their sex life and bind them together.
Capricorn and Virgo are another earth-earth combination. This can make them down-to-earth and work together hard to meet the demands of life. They may not be very flashy, but still, can enjoy a blissful love-life.
may not have much in common, but the differences in their characteristic traits can complement them instead of tearing them apart. If Capricorn can provide security, Pisces can bring in moderation in their life, and the destination can only be, joy.

All said and done, the Capricorns are conservatives, who are quite practical in their dealings. But Sagittarius is an adventurer, who is also an incurable optimist. While they both may consider these as their strengths, their partners may think otherwise. And the dissimilarities may be too much to bridge!

Capricorn & Aquarius Compatibility: Love, Marriage, Sex!
What will happen when people belonging to the zodiac signs
Capricorn and Aquarius are earth and air signs, in that order. When these two link up in life, will they be immersed in their own emotions, or overcome their hurdles to see a bright future in the life ahead? How stable will be the Capricorn Aquarius compatibility?
Capricorn and Aquarius Personality Traits
The Capricorn-goat is as aggressive as it is determined. A Capricorn looks for perfection and wants always to have the limelight. They are motivated by passion, while their
for other people and compassion are expressed through their activities. However, they are considered introverts, as they live in their worlds, and immersed in their activities.
Aquarius is an air sign. They flow like the air and are the most gentle and tender souls. They are very creative and have the mindset to explore various things in life. They love to be in the company of others and hate being confined and aloof.

relationship is a fascinating subject. Both of them tend to take in things slowly and would not bombard their emotions on their partners. Aquarius and Capricorn are air and earth signs. The goat is well- planned, meticulous and highly calculative. The Aquarius, on the other hand, looks for adventure, happiness, and thrill in life. When one of them fails to understand the other, this may cause a lot of stress in the relationship.
Capricorn is highly judgemental and may dominate the Aquarius, who always looks for a happy, casual, and relaxed life. Being a perfectionist, Capricorn can never tolerate the carefree attitude of Aquarius. It may be hard for the perfect and pragmatic Capricon to endure the choleric and melancholic Aquarius throughout life.
The Aquarius Capricorn compatibility requires a lot of commitment, compassion, and patience from both the partners. They should accept their partners for what they are and not force them to change. Taurus Compatibility: Love, Relationship, Marriage & Trust
To study Taurus compatibility, we need to analyze the sun sign Taurus in combination with each of the other sun signs. Each sun sign match has its own strengths and weaknesses, and unique characteristics.
The Taurus is the 2nd sign of the zodiac and is known as Rishabha in
. Taurus represents perseverance, and dedication and loyalty remain integral parts of its nature. True to its symbol, the bull, these people are known for their sustained hard work. Ruled by
, the planet of love, they remain the connoisseurs of beauty and also possess a remarkable sense of humor. But their determination may turn them stubborn at times and make them unreasonable.
people will generally get along well with like-minded people, and naturally, their compatibility should be good with those from such zodiac signs.

Virgo & Virgo Compatibility: Love, Marriage, Sex!
decide to partner one another for life, how will that bond work out?
Will, the similarity in their characteristics, pull them closer towards each other, or will they be like the same poles repelling one another?
Being an earth sign, the Virgos are known perfectionists. They are optimistic, progressive, and hardworking. They may also prove to be good supervisors and administrators. When it comes to communication, they may sometimes be too honest, which may not be liked by others. They may also be somewhat fussy, critical, and judgmental by nature.
Fill your details below to inbox your Love % to your email address:
Virgo-Virgo love compatibility can be quite strong. These people are natural communicators, and they will be able to convey their requirements precisely and make their partners understand them very well. Still, some of them may find it hard to understand the sexual needs of their companions, and this may contribute to the loss of emotional connect, often. But over time, they may make good progress in their sexual compatibility and light the flame of intimacy in their
life. But it is imperative for both to be extremely loyal in the relationship. Because if one of them tends to go astray even slightly, it can hurt the other badly and make them lose trust almost for ever.
The rapport of the Virgo pairs will generally be on firm footing and stable. The Virgo-Virgo compatibility is marked by positivity and progressive outlook. They can keep renewing themselves again when they are in love and can break barriers for the sake of their partners. The couples can thus be thrilled and keep enjoying each other's company, and one will even celebrate the other's success. They can thus fill their lives with a generous dose of love and affection.
Virgo and Virgo's combination has its own set of challenges, which may not be visible on the surface or be evident to others. Their values and approach may match perfectly. But strangely, this may very much remain the cause of friction between them, as both may try to fight for the same thing and dominate the other. Sometimes, they may turn so adamant that even their differing opinions about others may be enough to drive a wedge between them. Both may believe that they are right from their perspectives, and may not give up an inch for the other. This can bring a severe rift in the relationship.
Virgos are robust and like-minded individuals, and hence, the Virgo-Virgo compatibility can be one of the best among the sign-combinations. Even in the case of adversities, they can work in close coordination with each other and overcome the challenges. They are stable by nature, can comfort each other, and remain a pillar of support to the other, in times of difficulties. The Virgo-Virgo bond may become stronger over time, as they are likely to become more and more willing to pull together as an amicable couple.
The Virgos can seek astrological help to know about the sign combination in greater depth and consult professional
in this regard. There are also regular columns in many astrology websites like Virgo horoscopes today, Astrology Virgo,
today for Virgo, etc. The 'Virgo horoscopes today' can help them to know what is there in store for them on day to day basis, while 'Astrology Virgo' can give predictions for various longer durations of time.
